questions.questionText: The refractive index of glass is 1.5. If light travels with speed c in vacuum, its speed in glass is:
The critical angle for total internal reflection from glass to air is minimum for which color of light?
A convex lens of focal length 20 cm is placed in contact with a concave lens of focal length 25 cm. The power of the combination is:
A ray of light is incident at an angle of 60° on one face of an equilateral glass prism. If the ray undergoes minimum deviation, the angle of deviation is: (Refractive index = √3)

In a compound microscope, the focal length of the objective lens is 1 cm and that of the eyepiece is 5 cm. If an object is placed at 1.1 cm from the objective, and final image is formed at infinity, the magnifying power of the microscope is: (Least distance of distinct vision = 25 cm)
